forbidden_bridges: do not infer ExistsAt Terminal from TerminalClosed Terminal
do not infer creation from initial minimality alone
do not infer unrestricted closure from restricted closure

inputs.inductive_step: forall s1 s2, local_closure_predicate s1 -> AdmissibleStep s1 s2 -> local_closure_predicate s2

local_closure_invariant_source_dependenc.derivation_rule: conditional restricted closure may use local_closure_predicate only through supplied base_invariant_source and inductive_step_source
local_closure_invariant_source_dependenc.step_required_statement: inductive_step_source : forall s1 s2, local_closure_predicate s1 -> AdmissibleStep s1 s2 -> local_closure_predicate s2

non_claims: does not derive RestrictedClosureSurface from TerminalExistsSource alone
does not derive RestrictedClosureSurface from TerminalClosed Terminal
does not prove unrestricted closure theorem
statement: TerminalExistsSource + LocalClosureInvariantSource + ReachabilitySurface + TerminalClosureSurface + InitialMinimalitySurface -> RestrictedClosureSurface

terminal_exists_source_dependency.derivation_rule: conditional restricted closure may use ExistsAt Terminal only when supplied by terminal_exists_source
